signals.text: First Pulkit-led bi-weekly call completed Apr 1. Denise Shon attended with Nidhi. Productive 30-min session covering experiment analysis, platform strategy, and cleanup plan.
Recurring bi-weekly cadence established: 4 upcoming calls scheduled (Apr 15, Apr 29, May 13, May 27) every Wed 9am PT.
Pulkit proactively shared detailed experiment analysis in Slack (Apr 2): identified Classics Sampler bundle masking 12-pack minimum test, recommended new clean funnel with $2-3K budget.
FERMAT CVR down ~50% YoY per call discussion. Site CVR also down 5-10% YoY. Zero purchases in last 15 days on FERMAT platform.
No brand-side Slack messages in last 14 days. Denise has not replied to Pulkit's Apr 2 experiment analysis or Apr 1 recap yet.
Platform performance critically low: 0 purchases, $0 revenue, 273 sessions in last 7 days. Daily sessions dropped from 500-600 range (late Feb) to 14-93 range (late Mar/Apr).
Brand actively using FERMAT: Denise asked Intercom support questions about product reviews (Mar 17) and shop display (Mar 20). Brand engaged in experimentation despite low conversion.
Account needs cleanup: multiple unused product clones and outdated custom products identified. Pulkit audit in progress.

recent.title: De Soi x FERMÀT || Bi Weekly Connect
recent.summary: First Pulkit-led bi-weekly. Discussed FERMÀT CR down ~50% YoY, site CR down 5-10% YoY. 12-pack minimum experiment flawed due to bundle merchandising masking results. Decided to pause current experiment, set up new funnel with individual flavors first. Account cleanup needed for unused product clones. Okendo star ratings sync to be investigated. Biweekly Wed 9am PT cadence established.

action_items.item: Audit current experiment - confirm bundle-first merchandising is skewing results, share findings async
Complete full account audit: funnel setup, drop-off points, hierarchy suggestions, new funnel ideas
Provide cleanup list of all cloned/custom products mapped to landing pages
Investigate Okendo star ratings sync via agentic workflows
Set up recurring Wednesday 9am PT biweekly call
Loop in paid media agency before pausing current experiment
Create new FERMÀT funnel with individual flavors surfaced first
Review product/PDP cleanup list once provided

calls.analysis: First Pulkit-led call completed Apr 1 via Zoom (confirmed by Glyphic summary email, Zoom join notification, and Granola meeting notes). Denise Shon (recently inherited FERMÀT account after previous director of marketing + Mia left De Soi) attended with Nidhi Singh. Productive call focused on experiment analysis and platform strategy. Pulkit followed up same day with detailed recap in Slack and Apr 2 with deep experiment data analysis. Previously no De Soi calls since GM transition on Mar 3.

messages.author: Pulkit Srivastava
messages.content: Shared detailed experiment analysis: Classics Sampler bundle is masking the 12-pack minimum test. Control had 13 purchases ($1,257) and Variant 1 had 12 purchases ($1,038) for bundles. Individual flavors showed Variant 1 dropping 72% in purchases (18 to 5) and 66% in ATCs (62 to 21). Recommended new clean funnel test with $2-3K budget.

messages.author: Pulkit Srivastava
messages.content: Post-call recap: FERMÀT CVR down 50% YoY, site CVR down 5-10% YoY, 12-pack test no impact on FERMÀT but -10-15% on site. Action items listed for both sides. Biweekly Wed 9am PT established.

messages.author: Pulkit Srivastava
messages.content: Follow-up bump asking De Soi team to schedule intro call via calendar link.

messages.author: Pierre (FERMÀT Bot)
messages.content: Weekly Roundup Jan 5-11: 4,729 sessions, 113 purchases, $7,819 GMV, $6,586 revenue. Top funnels: Collection Grid Page Meta (2,867 sessions, $5,228 GMV, 2.65% CVR), Match Your Cocktail (1,488 sessions, $2,115 GMV, 1.95% CVR).

messages.author: De Soi team member
messages.content: Shared Google PMAX results: $2.02K spent on FERMÀT LP, CPA 8% better than OG PMAX, nCAC 18% better in TripleWhale vs .com.

slack.analysis: Engagement significantly improved since Apr 1 bi-weekly call. Pulkit posted a detailed call recap (Apr 1) and deep experiment analysis (Apr 2) in the channel. Brand last messaged Mar 11 (invoice routing request). Prior to Pulkit's transition (Mar 3), De Soi was actively engaged under Mia - asking about subscription funnels, split tests, hero media, and sharing Google PMAX results. Pierre bot weekly roundup from Jan 12 showed strong Jan performance (4,729 sessions, 113 purchases, $6,586 revenue). Key contact: Denise Shon (denise@drinkdesoi.com). Rebekah Foye also active in channel (paid media). Channel has seen a communication lull from the brand side since the GM transition, but the first bi-weekly call has re-established the relationship.

email.analysis: Strong email activity around Apr 1 bi-weekly call: Glyphic sent both a prep email and post-call summary, Zoom confirmed FERMÀT Copilot joined the meeting, and Nidhi Singh accepted the recurring bi-weekly invite. Denise Shon actively uses Intercom for platform questions (product reviews Mar 17, shop display Mar 20). No direct emails from Pulkit to De Soi contacts in last 30d - communication is primarily via Slack channel.

meetings.title: De Soi x FERMÀT
key_topics: Account cleanup of unused product clones

granola.analysis: One De Soi meeting found in Granola (Apr 1). This was the first Pulkit-led call since the Mar 3 GM transition. Denise explained she recently inherited the FERMÀT account after the previous director of marketing and Mia both left De Soi. The call was focused on using FERMÀT as a testing ground to apply learnings back to the main site. Detailed experiment discussion revealed the 12-pack minimum test was flawed because the Classics Sampler bundle was merchandised first, capturing most purchases before users scrolled to individual flavors being tested.

data_notes.fermat_api_status: Token expired during this refresh. Performance daily array retained from previous API pull (2026-04-06T06:27:55Z). Period sums recomputed from that daily data. No numbers were fabricated.
data_notes.glyphic_api_status: API returned error -32603 on list_calls. Call existence confirmed via Gmail (Glyphic prep + summary emails), Zoom join notification, Granola meeting notes, and Slack recap.
